author: vhegde91
body:
#### PR description:

This PR flags HCal RecHits in HBHE for Run 3 data. Some of the issues found in Run 3 data, due to readout issues, lead to bad RecHits. Such RecHits are flagged so that the consumers downstream, such as PF clustering, can ignore these RecHits.   We are trying to address Type A issues discussed in https://gitlab.cern.ch/cmshcal/docs/-/work_items/315 and details about these filters can be found here: https://indico.cern.ch/event/1688848/#5-bad-data-filters-development
The flags are used only for data since no such issues exist in MC. These flags are expcted to improve data quality in re-reco.
title: RecHit flagging for Run3 HBHE
